com.bankcore.exceptions.AccountNotFoundException

Description

  • Uses of AccountNotFoundException in com.bankcore.repository

    Methods in com.bankcore.repository that throw AccountNotFoundException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AccountRepository.addTransaction(String accountId, Transaction transaction)
    add a transaction to transactionhistory.
    void
    AccountRepository.delete(String accountId)
    delete an account by account id if accoun id dont exist throw exception in compile time
    List<Transaction>
    AccountRepository.getTransactionHistory(String accountId)
    get all tranasction acheived by an account.
    void
    AccountRepository.update(Account account)
    update an account information by providing an account

  • Uses of AccountNotFoundException in com.bankcore.service

    Methods in com.bankcore.service that throw AccountNotFoundException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BankService.applyInterest(String accountId)
    Applies the annual interest rate to a savings account balance.
    void
    BankService.applyTax(String accountId, double taxRate)
    Applies a tax rate to the balance of a savings account.
    void
    BankService.deleteAccount(String accountId)
    Permanently deletes an account from the system.
    void
    BankService.deposit(String accountId, double amount)
    Deposits the specified amount into the account and records the transaction.
    double
    BankService.getBalance(String accountId)
    Returns the current balance of the specified account.
    List<Transaction>
    BankService.getTransactionHistory(String accountId)
    Returns the full transaction history of the specified account.
    void
    BankService.transfer(String idAccountSender, String idAccountReceiver, double amount)
    Transfers the specified amount from one account to another.
    void
    BankService.withdraw(String accountId, double amount)
    Withdraws the specified amount from the account and records the transaction.
